pr_summary: Automated review found 17 issue(s) across security, correctness, performance, style, and test coverage.

findings.title: IDOR
findings.description: Sensitive operation performed using externally supplied identifiers without ownership verification.
findings.suggestion: Verify that the requesting user owns the resource before processing the operation.

findings.title: Missing Authorization
findings.description: Sensitive operation performed without permission, role, or authorization checks.
findings.suggestion: Implement appropriate role-based or permission-based checks before executing sensitive operations.

findings.line_content: +    await db.query('UPDATE users SET password = ? WHERE email = ?',
findings.title: Plain Text Password Storage
findings.description: Password appears to be stored or updated without hashing.
findings.suggestion: Use bcrypt or argon2 before persistence.
findings.evidence: await db.query('UPDATE users SET password = ? WHERE email = ?',

findings.title: Potential Large Collection Iteration
findings.description: Looping over large collections may become expensive.

findings.line_content: +    const user = await db.query('SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = ?', [id]);
findings.title: Potential N+1 Query Pattern
findings.description: Database query appears inside an iterative workflow and may execute once per item.
findings.suggestion: Batch queries using IN clauses or fetch data in a single query.
findings.evidence: const user = await db.query('SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = ?', [id]);

findings.title: Missing Result Validation
findings.description: Database query may return empty results.

findings.title: Null Dereference
findings.description: Calling ids.split(',') directly assumes ids is always present in query parameters, which will throw an error if ids is missing.
findings.suggestion: Add an existence check for ids before calling split.

findings.title: Null Dereference
findings.description: Calling user[0] directly assumes user array is always populated, which will throw an error if user array is empty.
findings.suggestion: Add a null check for user before accessing user[0].

findings.title: Null Dereference
findings.description: Calling users[log.user_id] directly assumes users array is always populated, which will throw an error if users array is empty.
findings.suggestion: Add a null check for users before accessing users[log.user_id].

findings.line_content: +    const user = await db.query('SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = ?', [id]);
findings.title: Inline SQL Statement
findings.description: Embedding SQL directly in business logic reduces maintainability.
findings.suggestion: Move queries into a repository or data-access layer.
findings.evidence: const user = await db.query('SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = ?', [id]);

findings.title: Missing Password Reset Tests
findings.description: Password reset or update logic has no accompanying verification tests.
findings.suggestion: Add unit tests verifying: 1) user not found, 2) password hashing verification, 3) unauthorized reset, and 4) invalid email format.

findings.title: Missing State Transition Tests
findings.description: Status updates require validation of state transitions.
findings.suggestion: Add unit tests verifying valid and invalid state transitions.
